chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-422 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A No.1821/2012 2. For hearing of M.A No.2320/2012 3. For hearing of main case 04.03.2019. Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G *** 1to3. After arguing the matter at some length learned counsel for petitioner submits that as far as grievances agitated in prayer clause ‘a’, ‘b’ & ‘c’ are, the same have been redressed. However, still the petitioner society has a grievance in respect of allotment of land situated in front of it to respondent No.15 by respondent No.10, for which he intends to approach an appropriate forum for cancellation of the same accordingly to law and seeks disposal of the petition in same terms. Accordingly the petition is disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
